final:
module RefModule(clk, rst, out, in);input wire clk;            
  input wire rst;            
  input wire [31:0] in;      
  output reg [31:0] out;     


    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always@(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin

    if (rst) begin
      out <= 32'b0;
    end

    
    else begin
      out <= in;
    end
    
  end

endmodule
